description: Style Note This grey top with a pretty pleated look, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Grey sleeveless top with a plunging V-neck, two pleated panels from the empire waist to the sides, pleated from the waist down and a broad band on the hem Material and Care Viscose/spandex blend Hand wash warm on reverse with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry on reverse Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
